mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
SELECT role_id FROM t_user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT r.role_code FROM t_role r INNER JOIN t_user_role ur ON r.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.status = 'NORMAL'

SELECT DISTINCT p.permission_code FROM t_permission p INNER JOIN t_role_permission rp ON p.permission_id = rp.permission_id INNER JOIN t_user_role ur ON rp.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 'NORMAL'

SELECT DISTINCT CONCAT(p.permission_method, ':', p.permission_url) FROM t_permission p INNER JOIN t_role_permission rp ON p.permission_id = rp.permission_id INNER JOIN t_user_role ur ON rp.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 'NORMAL' AND p.permission_url IS NOT NULL AND p.permission_method IS NOT NULL
SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%') AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE t_user SET last_login_time = NOW(), last_login_ip = #{loginIp}, login_fail_count = 0 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE t_user SET lock_time = NULL, login_fail_count = 0 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
